fields.name: ErrorText
fields.fieldText: Only System Administrators can edit this section at this stage of the Opportunity.

fields.name: Payment_Type
fields.helpText: Must include attachments if choosing Purchase Order, ACH/EFT/Wire or Signed Quote. Credit Card payment option requires the "Contact for Payment/AP Contact" field to be completed.

fields.name: Forms_Both
fields.helpText:
Purchase Order, ACH/EFT/Wire,
Signed Quote, Training Contact Spreadsheet, LOA etc

fields.name: Additional_Notes_Both
fields.helpText: Please provide additional information that is not already covered in the other fields on this tab.

fields.name: Product_Type_Coupon_Code_Percentage
fields.helpText: Please add details to align coupons, percentages, and the products together. Include approval name if applicable. Example PLC – PXDECP11514339 – 12% - Sales Manager Name

fields.name: Changing_or_Adding_to_Existing_License_Both
fields.fieldText: Changing or Adding to Existing License:

fields.name: Provide_current_SN_we_are_adjusting_Both
fields.fieldText: Provide current SN we are adjusting:

fields.name: Tenant
fields.helpText: Please indicate the existing tenant for 3DX products if applicable.

fields.name: Does_this_order_require_ITAR_Compliance
fields.fieldText: Does this order require ITAR Compliance?

fields.name: Training_on_PO_Both
fields.fieldText: Are training products on this order?
fields.helpText: Review and complete training fields

fields.name: Is_Corporate_Credits_or_Closed_Training_on_this_order
fields.fieldText: Is Corporate Credits or Closed Training on this order?

fields.name: Is_the_student_already_enrolled_as_unpaid_Both
fields.fieldText: Is the student already enrolled as unpaid?

fields.name: Are_there_additional_courses
fields.helpText: Please use the TRAINING ORDER SUBMISSION – MULTIPLE ENROLLMENTS.xls file in the Sales Hub.

fields.name: Are_services_products_on_this_order
fields.fieldText: Are services products on this order?
fields.helpText: Review and complete services fields.

value.stringValue: Upload copy of the spec sheet or SOW if required

fields.name: Are_hardware_products_on_this_order
fields.fieldText: Are hardware and related products on this order?
fields.helpText: Review and complete hardware fields

fields.name: Trade_In_Serial_Number_HW
fields.helpText: Provide the Serial Number of the model that is being traded in during this sale.

fields.name: Dock_hours_HW
fields.helpText: Indicate the hours the dock open including timezone.

fields.name: Lift_Gate_or_Pallet_Jack_required_for_delivery_HW
fields.fieldText: Lift Gate or Pallet Jack required for delivery:

fields.name: Vendor_Pricing_Details
fields.helpText: Upload any special discount approval pricing emails, or SSYS quotes etc.

value.stringValue: Summary_Description_of_Order__c, Payment_Type__c, Contact_for_Payment_AP__c, Contact_for_Payment_Netsuite_ID__c, Forms__c, Additional_Notes__c

Is_software_on_this_order__c, End_User_Ids__c, End_User_Names__c, End_User_Netsuite_Ids__c, Site_ID__c, SolidProfessor_Contact__c, SolidProfessor_Contact_NetSuite_ID_IO__c, CLOSA_Contact__c, CLOSA_Contact_Netsuite_ID__c, Discount_on_Order__c, Product_Type_Coupon_Code_Percentage__c, Changing_or_Adding_to_Existing_License__c, Provide_current_SN_we_are_adjusting__c, Tenant__c, Coterming_to_Existing_Assets__c, Coterming_to_what_date__c, Piracy__c, Case_ID__c, Does_this_order_require_ITAR_Compliance__c, ACR__c

Training_on_PO__c, Corp_credits_or_closed_training_on_order__c, Scheduling_Contact__c, Passport_Owner_Ids__c, Passport_Owner_Names__c, Passport_Owner_Netsuite_Ids__c, Is_student_already_enrolled_as_unpaid__c, Course_Name__c, Course_Date__c, Digital_or_in_person_location_pl__c, In_Person_Location__c, Student_Ids__c, Student_Names__c, Student_Netsuite_Ids__c, Are_there_additional_courses__c

Are_hardware_products_on_this_order__c, End_User_Ids_hardware__c, End_User_Names_hardware__c, End_User_Netsuite_Ids_hardware__c, Trade_in_Serial_Number__c, Shipping_Contact__c, Shipping_Contact_Netsuite_ID__c, Dock_Hours__c, Lift_Gate_or_Pallet_Jack_required__c, Vendor_Pricing_Details__c

fields.name: thevalue
fields.fieldText: Please fix the following errors before you can send this Opportunity to Order Management.

fields.name: PaymentTypeText
fields.fieldText: • Upload files supporting Payment Type

fields.name: AdditionalCoursesText
fields.fieldText: • Upload files supporting Additional Training Courses

fields.name: VendorPricingDetailsText
fields.fieldText: • Upload files supporting Vendor Pricing Details

fields.name: MissingPaymentContactText
fields.fieldText: • The Contact for Payment / AP field is required when Payment Type is Credit Card.

fields.name: HasInactiveProductsText
fields.fieldText: • This Opportunity includes inactive Products. Please remove inactive Products from the Products list.
